title.zh: 消息队列遥测传输协议

description.en: Lightweight publish/subscribe messaging protocol designed for IoT and constrained devices. Supports QoS levels, retained messages and last will.
description.zh: 为物联网和受限设备设计的轻量级发布/订阅消息协议。支持QoS等级、保留消息和遗嘱消息。

flags.en: Type-specific flags (DUP, QoS, RETAIN for PUBLISH)
flags.zh: 类型相关标志 (PUBLISH的DUP, QoS, RETAIN)

remainingLength.en: Remaining length of variable header and payload
remainingLength.zh: 可变头部和载荷的剩余长度
